sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112953" key="xalazobo/los" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰλαζο-βόλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n112953.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">showering hail,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">νέφη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.499f</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
